title: Special Dowrahs — Dhul Hijjah & Rabi Al-Awwal
about: Two special free dowrahs held during blessed Islamic months. All are welcome — no registration fee required.
subjects: Dhul Hijjah Dowrah — 23 May 2026: A historical walk through the Sacred Lands. Saturday, 1pm – Asr.
Rabi Al-Awwal Dowrah — 23 Aug 2026: The Daughters of Rasulullah ﷺ & their Mother RA. Sunday 9am–12pm.
